name: ethernetPacket Selectors: <protocol>.<field>.bitLength
title: ethernetPacket Selectors: <protocol>.<field>.bitLength
description: Bit length of a protocol field. The selector is read only.
If <protocol> or <field> is not contained in the packet, the selector returns 0. ethernetPacket::protocol::field::IsAvailable can be used to find out if the field is available.
return: Bit length of a protocol field.
